commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
import os, zipfile
import build_outputs
build_outputs.build_outputs()
path='[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]'
print('mtime', os.path.getmtime(path))
zf=zipfile.ZipFile(path)
for name in ['xl/worksheets/sheet5.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet8.xml']:
    data=zf.read(name).decode('utf-8')
    print(name)
    start=data.find('<row r="4">')
    print(data[start:start+500])
PY
